s3_dificil:
I just felt it was easiest to put my comments here. 

First the Savings Seeker i feel is complicated. one one side the savings seeker is easy to sell but they are more focused on cost reduction so they care a little less about the Company and Consultant as much as they do the price. they are usually price shoppers who usually try to find the cheapest company (Which we arent) I dont believe we are the cheapest. i feel the way the question is framed would lead people to say they are the easiest but in Windmars case i dont believe thats as true. We sell on Value and the stability of company ro justify why we may be more expensive

When they say they need to think about it in my opinion the rep has done one of these things. 

He was with a one legger and wife or husband wasnt there

The client doesnt fully understand the value prop ( when you say not interested most of the time they are saying we werent listning)

Most reps do too much talking in the home and they dont ask enough questions which keeps the client engaged throughout the time of sale.
